mnemonics.title: 5V Recall
mnemonics.content: Very Volatile Vehicles Value Variety (5Vs: Volume, Velocity, Veracity, Value, Variety)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine data as water gushing through multiple fire hoses simultaneously
Picture a mixed fruit basket with apples, oranges, and exotic fruits

analogies.analogy: Like managing all books in the Library of Congress - impossible with single shelf
Similar to gold mining - tons of ore (data) for few valuable nuggets (insights)
